author: Deyan Todorov
name: 11L Int5 + 6-Expert HedgeMixer + LeakyReLU(0.9)^2 + TTT
blurb: 11-layer 512-dim with 3.5x MLP, LeakyReLU(0.9)^2 activation, 6-expert Hedge context mixer (neural + unigram + bigram + trigram + 4-gram + entropy), GPTQ int5 mixed quantization + zstd-22, score-first TTT with Polyak averaging and byte-weighted loss, GatedAttention, ValueResidual, XSA on all 11 layers, Partial RoPE 16/64, LN Scale, EMA + Tight SWA.
architecture: 11 layers, 512 dim, 8 heads, 8 KV heads, MLP 3.5x, LeakyReLU(0.9)^2, tied embeddings
